popularStory.headline: Simon II
popularStory.description:
*Simon II "Le Chauve" de Montfort
born about 1117/21 Montfort-sur-Risle, Eure, France
died 13 March 1181
buried Cathedral, Evreux, Normandy, France

father:
*Amaury De Montfort
born Abt 1070 Of, Montf …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Simon de Montfort III於1121年6月21日出生在法國艾時，他的父親Amaury de Montfort II51歲，母親Agnes de Garlende27歲。他和Mathilde de Beaumont至少有3個兒子和1個女兒。他去世於1181年3月13日在法國艾-吉洛易丹諾維爾享年59歲，埋葬在法國豪-諾門迪瑟-馬利諾特-達-德-邦德維爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Simon de Montfort III于1121年6月21日出生在法国艾时，他的父亲Amaury de Montfort II51岁，母亲Agnes de Garlende27岁。他和Mathilde de Beaumont至少有3个儿子和1个女儿。他去世于1181年3月13日在法国艾-吉洛易丹諾維爾享年59岁，埋葬在法国豪-諾門迪瑟-馬利諾特-達-德-邦德維爾。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Montfort
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French and Breton: variant of   Monfort   1. This surname is most common in Brittany and Haute-Savoie. See also 2 below.
Altered form of Dutch Montfoort: habitational name from Montfoort in Utrecht. It is a cognate of 1 above (see Monfort 1) and also its altered form (or perhaps vice versa).
English (of Norman origin): very rare variant of   Mountford  , a cognate of 1 above.

variants.name: Monfort
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French/Haitian Jacques, Marcel, Monique, Wilner.

French and Breton: habitational name from any of numerous places called Montfort, from Old French mont ‘hill’ (see Mont 1) + fort ‘strong, impregnable’ (from Latin fortis). This surname is by far most common in Brittany. It is also found in Haiti. Compare Montfort 1, see also 2 below.
Altered form of Dutch Montfoort, a variant of Montfort 2 and also a cognate of the French name in 1 above and an altered form of its variant Montfort 1 (or perhaps vice versa).

variants.name: Monforte
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Angelo, Salvatore, Carmela, Carmine, Rocco, Rosaria, Sal.  Spanish Carlos, Francisco, Luis, Medardo.

Italian and Spanish: habitational name from any of numerous places called Monforte, from Latin mons ‘mountain’ (genitive montis) + fortis ‘strong’, probably a reference to the strategic position of these locations.
English (of Norman origin): variant of   Montfort  . This form of the surname is rare in Britain.

nameMeanings.name: Simon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Usual English form of Simeon , borne in the New Testament by various characters: two apostles, a brother of Jesus, a Pharisee, a leper, a tanner, a sorcerer (who offered money for the gifts of the Holy Ghost, giving rise to the term simony), and the man who carried Jesus's cross to the Crucifixion.

variants.name: Simen
meanings: Usual English form of Simeon , borne in the New Testament by various characters: two apostles, a brother of Jesus, a Pharisee, a leper, a tanner, a sorcerer (who offered money for the gifts of the Holy Ghost, giving rise to the term simony), and the man who carried Jesus's cross to the Crucifixion.

en.lifeSummary: When Simon de Montfort III was born on 21 June 1121, in Eure, France, his father, Amaury de Montfort II, was 51 and his mother, Agnes de Garlende, was 27. He had at least 3 sons and 1 daughter with Mathilde de Beaumont. He died on 13 March 1181, in Denonville, Eure-et-Loir, France, at the age of 59, and was buried in Notre-Dame-de-Bondeville, Seine-Maritime, Upper Normandy, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Simon de Montfort III est né le 21 juin 1121, à Eure, France, son père, Amaury de Montfort II, avait 51 ans et sa mère, Agnes de Garlende, avait 27 ans. Il a eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille avec Mathilde de Beaumont. Il est décédé le 13 mars 1181, à Denonville, Eure-et-Loir, France, à l’âge de 59 ans, et a été enterré à Notre-Dame-de-Bondeville, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Simon de Montfort III am 21. Juni 1121 in Eure, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Amaury de Montfort II 51 und seine Mutter Agnes de Garlende 27. Er hatte mit Mathilde de Beaumont mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 13. März 1181 im Alter von 59 Jahren in Denonville, Eure-et-Loir, Frankreich und wurde in Notre-Dame-de-Bondeville, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Simon de Montfort III è nato il il 21 giugno 1121 nel Eure, Francia, il suo padre, Amaury de Montfort II, aveva 51 anni e il suo madre, Agnes de Garlende, aveva 27 anni. Lui avuto almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia con Mathilde de Beaumont. Morì il 13 marzo 1181, nel Denonville, Eure-et-Loir, Francia, all'età di 59 anni, e fu sepolto a Notre-Dame-de-Bondeville, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Simon de Montfort IIIが1121年6月21日にフランスエウアで生まれた時，父Amaury de Montfort IIは51歳，母Agnes de Garlendeは27歳であった。彼はMathilde de Beaumontとの間に少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1181年3月13日にフランスエウレ-エト-ロイルデノンヴィルで59歳で死去し，フランスハウテ-ノーマンディセアイネ-マリティメノトレ-ダム-デ-ボンデヴィルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Simon de Montfort III(이)가 1121년 6월 21일 프랑스 우르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Amaury de Montfort II(은)는 51세였고, 그의 어머니 Agnes de Garlende(은)는 27세였다. 그는 Mathilde de Beaumont(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1181년 3월 13일 프랑스 우레-트-로이르 데넌빌에서 59세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 하테-노먼디 세이인-마이팀 노트레-다-데-본데빌에 묻혔다.

mn.21 June 1121–13 March 1181: 1121 оны Зургаадугаар сарын 21–1181 оны Гуравдугаар сарын 13

pt.21 June 1121–13 March 1181: 21 de junho de 1121–13 de março de 1181
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Simon de Montfort III nasceu em 21 de junho de 1121, em Eure, França, seu pai, Amaury de Montfort II, tinha 51 anos e sua mãe, Agnes de Garlende, tinha 27 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha com Mathilde de Beaumont. Ele faleceu em 13 de março de 1181, em Denonville, Eure-et-Loir, França, com 59 anos, e foi sepultado em Notre-Dame-de-Bondeville, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Simon de Montfort III родился 21 июня 1121 г. в местности эур, Франция, его отцу по имени Amaury de Montfort II было 51 год, а матери, которую звали Agnes de Garlende, 27. У него было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь от Mathilde de Beaumont. Он умер 13 марта 1181 г. в местности денонвилл, эуре-ет-лоир, Франция в возрасте 59 лет и был похоронен в местности нотре-дэме-де-бондевилл, сине-маритим, хауте-норманди, Франция.

es.21 June 1121–13 March 1181: 21 de junio de 1121–13 de marzo de 1181
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Simon de Montfort III nació el 21 de junio de 1121, en Eure, Francia, su papá, Amaury de Montfort II, tenía 51 años y su mamá, Agnes de Garlende, tenía 27 años. Tuvo por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija con Mathilde de Beaumont. Murió el 13 de marzo de 1181, en Denonville, Eure-et-Loir, Francia, a la edad de 59 años, y fue sepultado en Notre-Dame-de-Bondeville, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, Francia.
